items.title: Page updated: Sagadahoc County Probate Court

page_lines: SAGADAHOC COUNTY OFFICES ARE CLOSED ON FEDERAL HOLIDAYS
Click here for FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS
CLICK THE + BY PROBATE FORMS LINKS TO THE LEFT FOR OUR PRINTABLE FORMS
Click here to access our Notice to Creditors and Formal Publications
Please visit our website to use our e-filing system, forms and to search for probate cases statewide:
THE SAGADAHOC COUNTY PROBATE COURT ACCEPTS CASH, CHECK, OR MONEY ORDERS ONLY.
NO CREDIT CARDS OR DEBIT CARDS ARE ACCEPTED AS A METHOD OF PAYMENT.
SAGADAHOC COUNTY PROBATE COURT DOES NOT PROCESS PASSPORT APPLICATIONS!
Please visit our friends at the Bath Post Office, the Topsham Town Office for
"We can't solve all the world's problems, but we can make them a little easier on the 3rd floor at the Probate Court.

Our goal is to completely focus on what we can do for our customers during a time when most feel there isn't anything that can be done. We strive to provide tangible information in a safe environment while listening to hear instead of listening to respond to anyone who comes to our Court for assistance."
Hannah J. Dickinson, Deputy Register of Probate (2002-2022 and 2025-Present)
Founded February 14, 1854, Sagadahoc County is seated in Bath and home to
Arrowsic, Bath, Bowdoin, Bowdoinham, Georgetown, Perkins Township (Swan Island), Phippsburg, Richmond, Topsham, West Bath, and Woolwich.

The Sagadahoc County Probate Court processes and holds records for Adoptions, Guardianships, Conservatorships, Name Changes, and Estates, as well as provides information about resources to support each person that reaches for help, hope, or direction. We welcome you to call or visit us to learn about what we do and how we serve our community.
The Document Center provides easy access to public documents. Click on one of the categories below to see related documents or use the search function.
Categories always sorted by seq (sub-categories sorted within each category)
Documents sorted by SEQ in Ascending Order within category
